name: Kahlua Fantasy Choc. Cheesecake (Meryl Pdmk38b)
recipeInstructions:
FILLING
1 1/2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips
1/4 cup Kahlua
2 tablespoons butter
2 large eggs
1/3 cup sugar
1 cup sour cream
16 ounces cream cheese
Prepare the crust. Press firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. In a small saucepan, melt chocolate over medium heat with Kahlua and butter. Stir until smooth. Set aside. In a bowl, combine eggs and sugar. Add sour cream and blend well. Add cream cheese to egg mixture; beat until smooth. Gradually blend in the chocolate mixture. Turn into prepared crust. Bake for 40 minutes or until filling is barely set in the center. Remove from oven and let stand at room temperature for 1 hour. Then refrigerate several hours or overnight.
